tool_args.label: Q7 western-end reroute
tool_args.raw_text: The Q7 will be rerouted on its western end to provide new service along Rockaway Blvd between Liberty and Jamaica Avs.

payload.description: Q7 was rerouted on its western end to provide new service on Rockaway Boulevard between Liberty and Jamaica Avenues.
payload.location_text: Rockaway Boulevard between Liberty and Jamaica Avenues

normalized_location.raw_text: Rockaway Boulevard between Liberty and Jamaica Avenues

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Q7 will be rerouted on its western end to provide new service along Rockaway Blvd between Liberty and Jamaica Avs.

tool_args.label: Q7 Sutter/Pitkin segment discontinuation and Q112 replacement
tool_args.raw_text: Current Q7 service to East New York along Sutter and Pitkin Avs will be discontinued and replaced by the Q112 .

payload.description: Q7 service to East New York on Sutter and Pitkin Avenues was discontinued and replaced by Q112 service.
payload.location_text: Sutter and Pitkin Avenues to East New York

normalized_location.raw_text: Sutter and Pitkin Avenues to East New York

evidence_refs.source_quote: Current Q7 service to East New York along Sutter and Pitkin Avs will be discontinued and replaced by the Q112 .

tool_args.label: Q7 eastern-end shortening and JFK Cargo replacement service
tool_args.raw_text: On its eastern end, the Q7 will be shortened to the JFK Travel Plaza. Service to JFK Cargo Area C will be provided by Port Authority shuttles and the Q3 .

payload.description: Q7 was shortened to the JFK Travel Plaza; JFK Cargo Area C service was reassigned to Port Authority shuttles and Q3.
payload.location_text: JFK Travel Plaza and JFK Cargo Area C

normalized_location.raw_text: JFK Travel Plaza and JFK Cargo Area C

evidence_refs.source_quote: On its eastern end, the Q7 will be shortened to the JFK Travel Plaza. Service to JFK Cargo Area C will be provided by Port Authority shuttles and the Q3 .

tool_args.label: Queens redesign includes Q7 western-end reroute

payload.description: The implemented Q7 redesign includes the source-stated Q7 western-end reroute.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Q7 will be rerouted on its western end to provide new service along Rockaway Blvd between Liberty and Jamaica Avs.
